details.IncidentDetail: "[30] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1125-Traffic Hazard to CLOSURE-Closure of a Road by CHP"
"[29] B42-011 CORDS 97 - SPOKE TO PGE // UNK ETA // CONDITIONS UNAFE TO WORK IN UNK WHEN THEY WILL GET TO IT"
"[28] 42-18 - RELIEVED BY CORDS ON 18 SIDE OF CLOSURE // ADVISE 42-11 ANOTHER CORDS EMPLOYEE ENRT NOW TO RELIEVE 11 // 11 CPZ"
"[26] [Notification] [CHP]-NCSO LL - 2 TKS ON WAY // 1 HAD EQUIPMENT FAILURE // HAD TO GET DIFFERENT TK - SHOULD BE 97 SHORTLY // BOTTOM HALF SHOULD BE CLOSED"
"[25] 1039 NCSO - STATED AT LINE 22 - CORDS WERE LOADING UP STUFF AND ENRT / WILL CB W/ ETA"
"[24] 42-11 VIA MDC MSG REQ ETA FROM CORDS"
"[22] NCSO ADV ETA 20-30 MIN"
"[21] 1039 NCSO - WILL CB WITH ETA ON CORDS "
"[20] 42-S3 VIA LL CORDS NEED TO COME OUT TONIGHT/AREA UNSAFE/ REQ ETA"
"[18] 1039 NCSO FOR CORDS - CPZ LINE LINE 15 / 17"
"[15] 42-18 - PGE REQ TO INFORM CORDS IDAHO MARYLAND X BANNER LAVA CAP HARD CLOSURE - MULT POLES COMPRAMIZED "
"[13] REPORTS FROM PASSING MOTORISTS OF MORE POWER LINES/TREES DOWN ON IDAHO MARYLAND BETWEEN BRUNSWICK AND BANNER LAVA CAP. WOULD PGE LIKE A HARD CLOSURE OF THE AREA TO ASSESS/WORK? THANK YOU"

"[12] 42-11 VIA MDC CAN YOU CHECK WITH PGE AND SEE IF POWER IS SHUT DOWN IN THE AREA? IM DIVERTING TRAFFIC AT ID MRYLND/BLC BUT TRAFFIC IS STILL COMING UP ID MRYLAND GOING UNDERNEATH THE TREE/POWER LINES"
"[10] 1039 PGE - STILL SHOWING PGE 97 / HAS MULT CALLS ITA IDAHO MARYLAND X LEE"
"[9] 42-11 VIA MDC - HAD TO GO GO BACK UP HILL TO HELP TURN TRAFFIC AROUND, CAME BACK AND PGE NO LONGER 97, DOES NOT LOOK LIKE ANYTHING HAS BEEN DONE TO ALLEVIATE ISSUE. CAN YOU GO LL PLEASE"
"[1] TREE DOWN 1125 ALL LANES // POWER LINE UNDER TREE // NEG SPARKING SEEN"
"[4] 300-K3 - ADV 45-D2 - CT REQ THEM TO RESPOND 20 X HARMONY RIDGE - PED 97 - POSS LOST IN SNOW "

Log.Location: "Oak Creek Rd / Tehachapi Willow Springs Rd"

details.IncidentDetail: "[1] OAK CREEK RD CLOSED FROM TEHACHAPI WILLOW SPRINGS RD TO CEMENT PLANT RD DUE TO SNOW AND ICE"
"[1] WOODFORD TEHACHAPI RD CLOSED FROM SR58 TO PINON CANYON RD DUE TO SNOW AND ICE"
"[1] WATER CANYON RD CLOSED FROM HIGHLINE RD TO SOUTH TO MOUNTAIN PARK DUE TO SNOW AND ICE"
"[1] TEHACHAPI WILLOW SPRINGS RD CLOSED FROM HIGHLINE RD TO BACKUS RD DUE TO SNOW AND ICE"
"[1] ROAD DEAD ENDS AT THE NORTH END OF LAKE ST AND OLD US HWY 395"
"[11] SR89 (MONITOR PASS) - WINTER CLOSURE"
"[9] SR270 (BODIE RD) - WINTER CLOSURE"
"[8] SR120W (TIOGA PASS) - WINTER CLOSURE"
"[7] SR120E (MONO MILLS) - WINTER CLOSURE"
"[6] SR 158 (NORTH JUNCTION) - WINTER CLOSURE"
"[5] CRESTVIEW REST AREA - WINTER CLOSURE"
"[4] SR203 (REDS MEADOW) - WINTER CLOSURE"
"[3] SR168 (ASPENDELL) - WINTER CLOSURE"
"[2] REDROCK RANDSBURG RD - CLOSED FROM SR14 TO US395 DUE TO STORM DAMAGE"
"[1] GARLOCK RD - CLOSED FROM REDROCK RANDSBURG RD TO US395 DUE TO STORM DAMAGE"
"[14] C85-004 SPOKE TO CALTRANS, STILL CLOSED FOR HIGH PROFILE VEHICLES [Shared]"
"[13] PER 85-S4, NEG ON MAKING CONTACT WITH DOT ON OPENING THE ROADWAY FOR ALL TRAFFIC [Shared]"
"[11] PER 85-4 ON LL, DOT IS GETTING INFO THAT CHP ADVISED TO OPEN THE ROAD FOR ALL TRAFFIC [Shared]"

"[9] ^CT650 -- WIND ADVS UPGRADED TO HIGH PROFILE VEHS NOT ALLOWED // HIGH PROFILE VEHS HEADING EB WILL BE DIVERTED AT EAST WILLOWS RD, WB VEHS WILL BE DIVERTED AT OCOTILLO S2 OFR // REGULAR PASSENGER VEHS ALLOWED TO PASS AT THIS TIME [Shared]"
"[7] [7] 108-S9 CPS WIND ADVISORY ONLY AT THIS TIME - RDWY STILL OPEN TO ALL VEHS [Shared]"
"[5] [5] [Notification] [CHP]-CT654 CB -- ADVSD THAT CT IS NOT DIVERTING HIGH PROFILE VEHS AT THIS TIME, ONLY HAVE HIGH WIND ADVISORY IN PLACE[Shared]"
"[4] [4] ^1039 CT650 FOR UPDATE ON WIND ADVS // WILL CALL CREWS AND CB W/ UPDATE[Shared]"
"[2] [2] DIVERTING HIGH PROFILE VEHS OFF AT WEST WILLOWS [Shared]"
"[1] EXTREME GUSTY WINDS TA FOR ALL VEHS"
"[7] [Appended, 18:35:09] [1] ,^RAINING, COLD,STRONG GUSTY WINDS, TRAVEL ADVISORY FOR ALL VEHICLES"
"[5] [Notification] [CHP]-^REF TASK REQUEST ASKING FOR WIND GUSTS -- MTN SPRINGS IS 31.1 MPH SUSTAINED and 57 MPH GUSTS "
"[4] ^CT'S WIND ADV HAS BEEN/CONTINUES TO BE IN EFFECT SINCE 2/16 (260216EC0036) / PCMS'S REMAIN ACTIVATED FOR WINTER WEATHER and HIGH PROFILE VEHS NOT ADVSD"
"[3] 85-3; EXTREMELY GUSTY WINDS TA FOR ALL VEHS"
"[1] COLD CLOUDY LT DRIZZLE STRONG WINDS TA FOR ALL VEHS"
